Package org.rodinp.internal.core.relations

Class ElementParser

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.relations.ElementParser
Direct Known Subclasses:
ElementParser.AttributeTypeParser, ElementParser.ChildTypeParser, ElementParser.RelationshipParser, ElementParser.UbiquitousParser, LegacyItemParsers.LegacyAttributeReferenceParser, LegacyItemParsers.LegacyAttributeRelationParser, LegacyItemParsers.LegacyChildRelationParser, LegacyItemParsers.LegacyChildTypeParser
public abstract class ElementParser extends Object
Parsers for single configuration elements contributed to the itemRelations extension points.
